Back to HVAC calculators

What Is Each Booked Job
Actually Costing You?

Most HVAC companies track leads. Very few know what it costs to book a real job. Enter your numbers and see your true cost per booked job against stronger HVAC benchmarks.

Lead counts are noisy. Cost per booked job is what tells the truth.

Use this to translate HVAC spend into booked-job economics so you can see whether your current channel mix is efficient or quietly expensive.

  • Your true cost per booked job
  • How far you are from top benchmark ranges
  • Whether spend or conversion is the bigger issue
Your Marketing Numbers Benchmarked against stronger HVAC booked-job ranges
Primary channel Benchmark your main source
Monthly marketing spend ads + agency fees combined
$
Inbound calls / leads per month all sources combined
Booking rate % of leads that become booked jobs
%
HVAC benchmark:28-35% average · 50%+ strong
Average job ticket Average revenue per booked job
$
Marketing Diagnostic Waiting for your numbers
📊

Most HVAC owners underestimate this by 30-60%.

Platform dashboards show cost per lead. They do not show what each booked job actually costs once weak booking rates and mixed lead quality are factored in.

The gap between your number and the stronger HVAC range shows how much waste may be sitting in channel mix, booking rate, and lead quality.
